_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Amba muhasho, ndo dzhena.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan yo vhewa u bva i vhulelwa kha luambo luṅwe na luṅwe. Luambo luṅwe na luṅwe vhu na mupfumedzano muthihi wa u shandulula.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Tshedu ya luambo na mitengo ya Marks ndi ya tshifhinga. Marks zwishandiso zwa u dzhena, si manweledza.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Shandulula Liana Banyan kha {{language}}. Dzhia {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Zwidodombedzwa zwa nḓila na mafhungo a phoso
speakFriend.claimBounty: Humbula Mupfumedzano uyu wa U Shandulula
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Luambo lwa tshiofhisi -- a si na mupfumedzano.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Ipfi la Muṱanganedzi: Ndi Ngani Maipfi Aṱo
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Ipfi riṅwe na riṅwe kha platform iyi riṇavha zina nga ndivho. Ḓisendeko ḽa madzina 26 a botshelo.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Mipfumedzano ya U Shandulula I Shuma Hani
speakFriend.step1Body: Vhula Mupfumedzano wa U Shandulula kha Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Shandulula maḓagasi oṱhe. Ruma nga Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Nga murahu ha u amukela, u dzhia Marks u ṅwalwa kha IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Ri muhasho, zwi ite."

languageSwitcher.tip: Shandukisa mufinyu wa luambo lwa nnḓa kha Muḓo wa Durin u vhula zwiimo zwa tshenzhelo!
